remaining_tasks.name: FedStat extraction returns empty_slice for ALL queries
remaining_tasks.description: Every FedStat path: coverage ok → extraction plan ok → deterministic_tools → empty_slice (0 rows). Root cause is in _filter_rows() in app/data/fedstat_adapter.py — geography or period filter doesn't match Parquet column format. Seen in: ВВП России 2024, ВВП RUS+KAZ comparison, ВВП+инфляция+безработица 2000-2018. World Bank extraction WORKS fine.

remaining_tasks.name: WB all-missing_value rows: 'нет данных' message + charts = contradictory UX
remaining_tasks.description: GC-004: 198 WB rows all missing_value. Outcome=passed, chart renders inline. But narrator says data absent. Narrator should say 'данные есть, но значения отсутствуют' OR critic should downgrade when all records are missing_value.

remaining_tasks.name: GC-011: no_data supervisor route overridden by intent needs_clarification
remaining_tasks.description: _route_after_intent checks intent.needs_clarification before supervisor_route=no_data. Fix: check supervisor_route=no_data first in graph.py routing.

remaining_tasks.name: Run all 20 golden cases, measure pass rate after FedStat fix

blockers.description: FedStat empty_slice: debug by running single extraction with print of Parquet column values vs filter values. Entry point: app/data/fedstat_adapter.py _filter_rows(). Likely: geography='Russia' vs actual value 'Российская Федерация', or period int vs string mismatch.
blockers.workaround: World Bank works — WB GDP sources return data correctly

decisions.decision: Number verifier: advisory warning only, never blocks outcome
decisions.rationale: False positives on rounded/scaled values; adapters guarantee source-bound numbers
Intent analyst prompt updated; RD handles decomposition via Qwen

decisions.decision: Partial coverage: status=partial accepted, narrator adds ⚠️ note
decisions.rationale: User wants partial data over not_found

decisions.decision: LLM unavailable → gated/stopped, zero fallback paths
decisions.rationale: Core architectural invariant, UI label fixed to reflect this

next_action: Debug FedStat empty_slice: add print/logging to _filter_rows() in app/data/fedstat_adapter.py. Run: PYTHONPATH=. python3 -c "from app.data.fedstat_adapter import _filter_rows; import pyarrow.parquet as pq; t=pq.read_table('.local/dataagent/fedstat/parquet/57395.parquet'); rows=t.to_pylist()[:3]; print(rows[0].keys(), rows[0])" to see actual column names/values, then compare to what extraction_planner sends as filters.
context_notes: Session: 5-query MVP batch showed 40% pass rate. 6 fixes implemented and merged to main. FedStat empty_slice is the biggest remaining blocker — World Bank works, FedStat doesn't extract. 210/229 tests green. Web server :8787 running.
